title: Ghost  Creeper Totem
description: Creepers die a sad death trying to kill you, but no longer all of them are like that. With this Ghost Creeper Totem Creeper now sacrifice them self's for you!
body:
# What You get:
- Ghost Creeper Totem
- Explosion/Glowing Animation

## Why I made it:

  Creepers usually die a sad death trying to kill you—but not all of them anymore. With the Ghost Creeper Totem, Creepers now sacrifice themselves for you!

![Ghsot Creeper Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776b9fbf48ad2033cd69e80a911ea52144334a8c.png)
